case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. VS ABIERA JUNE D.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ABIERA JUNE D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ABIERA JUNE D.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $360.25 ACCRUED INTEREST, $75.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT ABIERA JUNE D.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ABIERA JUNE D.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABIERA JUNE D. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $71.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,571.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $862.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ABIERA JUNE D.
